name: C-17 --force allows removal of a default bundled entry
command:
printf -- '- id: soc2-tsc
  url: https://x.com
- id: another
  url: https://y.com
' > cat.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" soc2-tsc --catalog cat.yaml --force && ! grep -q '^- id: soc2-tsc' cat.yaml && echo removed 1>&2
